title: Verify Trial Corner content sections display correctly for an active user
description: Tests the dynamic content sections (Engagement, Trending) within the Trial Corner hub are populated as per the PRD logic.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and has acquired content but watched <90% of it.
User has a primary dialect set.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The 'Engagement' section shows the user's acquired content and auto-plays the trailer. The 'Trending' section shows the Top 10 shows/movies in the user's primary dialect.
